atoms.source_snippet:
let capacity = ritual_metrics::block::block_build_trace_capacity();
        let limit = limit.unwrap_or(200).min(capacity);

        let attempts = ritual_metrics::block::recent_block_build_attempts(limit)
            .into_iter()
            .map(|entry| BlockBuildAttemptDebug {
                sequence: entry.sequence,
                ts_micros: entry.ts_micros,
                payload_id: entry.payload_id,
                block_number: entry.block_number,
                block_time: entry.block_time,
                outcome: entry.outcome,
                total_duration_micros: entry.total_duration_micros,
                phases: entry
                    .phases
                    .into_iter()
                    .map(|phase| BlockBuildPhaseDebug {
                        phase: phase.phase,
                        duration_micros: phase.duration_micros,
                        tx_count: phase.tx_count,
                        scheduled_tx_count: phase.scheduled_tx_count,
